failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of reaction byproducts at high pressure
failure_modes.mitigation: Regularly clean BPR valve and monitor pressure drop across valve

failure_modes.cause: Deposition of solid byproducts on reactor walls
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement periodic cleaning protocol and use inline filters

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct a continuous 24-hour run with periodic sampling to check for reactor fouling
Test BPR valve operation under simulated blockage conditions to ensure pressure relief
